title: RESULT — score card
subtitle: Single centered card. Numeric score is the largest element. Two CTAs at the bottom answer 'where do I go now?'

regions.label: SCORE RING
regions.note: Circular gradient ring + 96 px figure. Highest visual weight = highest information value.

regions.label: VERDICT COPY
regions.note: Bold verdict, one congratulation line, one quantified summary line.

regions.label: ACTION ROW
regions.note: Outlined secondary + filled primary. Color hierarchy = importance.
